title: [W] WildCamps
description: Adds immersive campsites to world generation with over 300 variants, abandoned camps, balanced loot, and seamless vanilla-style exploration.

# WildCamps

**WildCamps** enhances Minecraft's world generation by adding abandoned campsites scattered throughout the wilderness. Designed to blend seamlessly with the vanilla aesthetic, these small points of interest make the world feel more lived-in and rewarding to explore without altering core gameplay.

Whether you're traveling through dense forests, snowy taigas, lush jungles, or even the Nether, you'll occasionally discover traces of previous adventurers who once called these places home.

## ‚ģö Features

- **Over 300 handcrafted campsite** variants distributed across 16 unique biomes
- **Biome-specific** campsite designs that naturally match their surroundings
- Support for a **wide variety of environments**, including the Pale Garden, Crimson Forest, and Warped Forest
- **Lootable chests and barrels** containing biome-themed supplies and resources
- **Vanilla-friendly** design philosophy focused on immersion and exploration
- **Lightweight** world generation with no gameplay overhauls

### A Vanilla+ Exploration Experience

WildCamps is designed for players who want their worlds to feel richer and more immersive without changing the core Minecraft experience. Every campsite is handcrafted to look like a natural part of its biome, offering small discoveries that reward exploration while staying true to vanilla Minecraft.

‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą„ÉĽ ‚ú¶ „ÉĽ‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą‚Ēą

# The Wilderness Series

**WildCamps** is part of the **Wilderness Series**, a collection of Vanilla+ Minecraft mods centered around nature, exploration, and the wilderness.

The goal of the series is to make Minecraft's natural world feel richer, more immersive, and more alive while staying true to the vanilla experience. Every addition is designed to blend seamlessly into the game, feeling like a natural extension of Minecraft's existing environments.

WildCamps contributes to this vision by adding abandoned campsites and environmental storytelling throughout the world, rewarding exploration without changing core gameplay.
